name: Companhia de Participacoes Alianca da Bahia
summary: Companhia de Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes Alian√É¬ßa da Bahia, through its subsidiaries, engages in raising, rearing, selecting, fattening, buying, and selling of cattle and other species, and related agricultural activities in Brazil.
